description: Expected ingest output-ranges for verifying that any ingest-backend (Claude CLI, OpenRouter Gemini Flash, GLM, Qwen) produces a coherent wiki from the Trail origin-story fixture. Ranges are deliberately loose so different models with different compile-behaviours can all pass — the goal is 'produces a reasonable wiki', not 'produces identical output'.

fixture_stats.note_on_typed_edges: The fixture source itself uses bare [[links]]; typed edges are created by the compiler during ingest based on the prose ('A is part of B' → [[B|part-of]] in compiled neuron). Ground-truth tracks how many typed edges the compile actually produces.

source_summary_page.description: One source-summary page under /neurons/sources/ referencing the uploaded filename.

concept_pages.description: Under /neurons/concepts/. Reasonable min-max range for a ~1100-word fixture with 11 sections.

entity_pages.description: Under /neurons/entities/. Named persons + organisations + tools in the fixture PLUS context-inferred entities the model may promote to entity pages (e.g. Cloudflare R2, Drizzle ORM mentioned in the Tech Stack section). Range widened after 2026-04-24 Gemini Flash run produced 15.
entity_pages.entity_linking_assertion: Every occurrence of these 10 names in concept-pages + source-summary MUST be wrapped in [[wiki-links]]. Tested by parsing concept + summary content and regex-counting un-wrapped mentions vs total mentions.

wiki_backlinks.description: Rows in wiki_backlinks table after ingest. Every [[wiki-link]] that resolves via canonical slug OR F148 normalizedSlug fold counts. The compile typically produces 3-5× more backlinks than source [[links]] because each concept page cross-references 2-3 others. Range widened after 2026-04-24 Gemini Flash run produced 123.

typed_edges.description: Subset of wiki_backlinks where edge_type != 'cites'. Source uses bare [[links]] only; typed edges are the compiler's job. Good models (Sonnet, Gemini Flash 2-pass) emit 3-15; weaker single-pass models may emit 0-3.
semantic_relationships_implied_by_source: Neuron is-a knowledge-atom (from 'En Neuron er et knowledge-atom')
Knowledge Base part-of Trail (from 'hver KB ejer tusindvis af Neuroner')
F152 supersedes manual-env-switch (from 'supersedes manual env-baseret model-switch')
Compile-at-ingest supersedes verbatim-memory (from 'forskellen mellem verbatim memory og compile-at-ingest')

glossary_entries.description: Entries added to /neurons/glossary.md. F102 says 1-3 durable fagtermer per ingest.

broken_links.description: F148 link-checker findings. After ingest completes AND link-checker runs, a well-behaved model produces 0 broken links. Non-zero = the entity-linking rule or slug-consistency rule was not followed.
broken_links.hard_rule: On a production run we require 0. On first pass of a new backend we allow up to 2 as grace — any more indicates the prompt's slug-rules are not landing.

ingest_job.description: The ingest_jobs row created for this ingest.

claude-cli.description: Max Plan → 0. Anthropic API direct → depends on model.

usage.description: Intended to be consumed by F149 verification scripts (verify-backend-claude.ts, verify-backend-openrouter.ts, trial-fallback-*.ts). Each script uploads ingest-reference.md, awaits ingest completion, queries the DB for actual counts, and asserts against the ranges above.
usage.reproducibility: Ranges are wide enough that a run which would rationally satisfy 'the spec produces a reasonable wiki' passes, but tight enough that a regression (e.g. prompt change that skips entities) fails visibly.
usage.when_to_tighten: After 10+ successful runs on a given model, narrow the ranges toward observed medians. Keep a changelog in this file's header so drift is traceable.

changelog.author: F149 planning session
changelog.change: Initial fixture + ground-truth authored. Ranges set by reasoning, not measurement — must be verified against first live ingest runs and tightened.

changelog.author: F149 Phase 2d smoke test
changelog.change: First live Gemini Flash ingest completed in 55s at 3¢. Observed: 11 concepts, 15 entities, 1 source-summary, 123 backlinks, 0 typed edges, 33 broken links (F148 correctly caught context-missing references). Widened entity_pages range to 7-18 and wiki_backlinks to 60-180. Flash was richer in cross-references than the initial reasoned range assumed.
